description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This fragrance captures emotions. Product Details Rasasi Emotions is a perfume spray for men with an aromatic fresh fragrance. Top notes are bergamot and orange blossom. The middle notes are lavender, violet, cinnamon and rose. The base notes patchouli, tonka bean, sandalwood and amber musk. This perfume comes in a stylish and innovative flask Size 100 ml
